content: Hey, I'm Zion. I just moved to Phoenix, AZ from the Bay Area and I'm looking to learn some new skills. I've been working remotely as a UX Researcher for a big tech company, but I want to explore my hobbies more. I'm really into DJing and tennis.
Hi Zion! Welcome to Phoenix! That's exciting that you're looking to learn new skills. What aspects of DJing and tennis are you interested in improving or exploring further?

Well, I've been DJing for about 5 years now, but I want to learn how to produce my own music. I've heard great things about a music production course at the Phoenix Music Academy. Have you heard of it?
Yes, I have! The Phoenix Music Academy is a great institution. They offer a variety of courses, including music production. What type of music are you interested in producing?
I'm really into electronic dance music. I've been listening to a lot of Calvin Harris and The Chainsmokers lately. I also enjoy playing tennis at the Phoenix Tennis Center with my friend, Alex.

That's great! Electronic dance music is a popular genre. I can help you find some online resources to get started with music production. Have you considered taking a course or watching tutorials on YouTube?

Yeah, I've watched a few tutorials, but I think I need something more structured. I'm planning to start the course at the Phoenix Music Academy in January 2024. I'm also thinking of joining a tennis league at the Phoenix Tennis Center.

That sounds like a great plan! Starting a new course in January will give you something to look forward to after the holidays. How many hours a week do you think you'll be able to dedicate to music production and tennis?
I think I can dedicate around 10 hours a week. I'm also interested in learning more about coffee brewing, as I've recently purchased a coffee maker from a store on 5th Street in Phoenix.
That's a good amount of time to start with. Coffee brewing is a great hobby! There are many coffee shops in Phoenix that offer coffee brewing classes. I can help you find one near you.

That would be great, thanks! I'm looking forward to exploring my hobbies more in Phoenix. I've also been thinking of trying out archery, as I've heard great things about the archery range at the Ben Avery Shooting Facility.
